title: angelica roylei
intro: Angelica roylei, also known as Himalayan angelica, is a perennial plant species native to the Himalayan region. It belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing stress and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Angelica roylei include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
